title: hieracium subepimedium
intro: Hieracium subepimedium, also known as Hawkweed, is a flowering plant species in the dandelion family that is native to the mountainous regions of Europe. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds and skin issues. The health benefits of Hieracium subepimedium include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or salve, and it is often used to treat conditions such as eczema, acne, and minor cuts and scrapes.
